architecture.note: pure deterministic string emitter; no import-direction, resilience, or I/O concerns

security.note: no auth/injection/secrets/network surface; methodology emitter over fixture manifests

quality.cr10_perf: no anti-pattern matches; all loops iterate small in-memory collections, no I/O in loops
quality.test_coverage: 7 new unit tests cover all new behaviour; 14 WP-001 tests unbroken
